event_description: Fired when a user successfully creates a new account via email or OAuth.
Fired when a user successfully authenticates via email or OAuth.
Fired when a user finishes the onboarding wizard and their profile is marked complete.
Fired when a new marketing campaign is successfully created.
Fired when a campaign's status is updated (e.g., started or terminated).
Fired when an owner or manager sends a team member invitation.
Fired when a team member's role is updated.
Fired when a collaborator is removed from the restaurant team.
Fired when a new employee record is added to the system.
Fired when a performance review is saved for an employee.
Fired when the user initiates a new AI assistant conversation.
Fired when an AI-powered revenue review is successfully generated.
Fired when a CSV file of financial transactions is successfully imported.
Fired when a new restaurant is created in the workspace settings.
